templates.description: Frostgate Settlement Office needs a practical first-week plan before it will clear your settlement support. You must resolve temporary heating allocation, a recognized address, and a verified winter transport route without spending the emergency reserve that protects you from an early setback.
templates.instructions:
Review the official Frostgate arrival notice and list every deadline, deposit, document, or service requirement.
Select one verified housing or address path and calculate its first-week cash commitment.
Confirm one lawful income, training, public-service, or enterprise lead tied to strategic-minerals, sensor manufacturing, and cold-chain services.
Document a fallback through Frostgate Settlement Office and state the amount of cash that remains protected.

requirementsPayload.objective: Produce a verified first-week stabilization plan for Frostgate that resolves temporary heating allocation, a recognized address, and a verified winter transport route and preserves a minimum emergency reserve.
requirementsPayload.submissionRequirement: Submit a four-part stabilization dossier: requirement checklist, selected address path, first-week cash plan, and verified fallback contact.

templates.title: Frostgate Arrival Stabilization

templates.description: Two legitimate income paths are available in Frostgate: a supervised mineral-assay placement and a cold-chain logistics assistant role. Compare the real costs, timing, and risks before committing your limited starting capital.
templates.instructions:
Record expected first-week income, required equipment or transport, and the earliest realistic payment date for each option.
Explain how heating costs, weather delays, and concentrated energy supply could reduce or delay each option’s value.
Reject any option that depends on an unavailable mechanic, unverified employer, or unlicensed transaction.
Choose one path and define a fallback trigger that would cause you to switch.

requirementsPayload.objective: Compare a supervised mineral-assay placement with a cold-chain logistics assistant role and select the path that best preserves liquidity under heating costs, weather delays, and concentrated energy supply.
requirementsPayload.submissionRequirement: Submit a side-by-side livelihood comparison with cash timing, required inputs, risk adjustment, selected path, and fallback trigger.

templates.title: Northreach Verified Livelihood Plan

templates.description: A local operator wants a concise opportunity brief on precision sensing and mineral verification services. The brief must identify a credible buyer, a realistic constraint, and evidence that the opportunity is more than speculative hype.
templates.instructions:
Define the customer problem inside strategic-minerals, sensor manufacturing, and cold-chain services and name the buyer or institution most likely to pay.
Use approved market, Store, Contract, or country information to support one demand claim.
Quantify or rank the downside caused by heating costs, weather delays, and concentrated energy supply.
Recommend a bounded first transaction or pilot that does not require unsupported features.

requirementsPayload.objective: Evaluate the commercial potential of precision sensing and mineral verification services in Frostgate and identify the most important downside created by heating costs, weather delays, and concentrated energy supply.
requirementsPayload.submissionRequirement: Submit a market brief containing customer, problem, evidence, downside risk, and a bounded pilot recommendation.
